description_long: This is a classic men's oxford dress shoe crafted from smooth brown leather, featuring a closed lacing system with five eyelets on each side. The upper is adorned with subtle brogue detailing along the cap toe and quarters, adding a touch of sophistication. The shoe has a low stacked heel and a slightly rounded toe, providing both style and comfort. The interior appears to be lined with a lighter tan material, likely leather or synthetic for added comfort. The outsole is flat and appears to be made of a durable material, suitable for urban walking. The overall construction and finish suggest a high-quality, formal shoe ideal for business or dress occasions.
description: A brown leather oxford dress shoe with brogue detailing, closed lacing, and a low stacked heel. The shoe is polished and formal, suitable for urban or business settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, cap toe brogue detailing, and closed lacing system.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth leather upper, subtle brogue accents, and low heel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel counter, seam details, and the opening of the shoe.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the clean lines and brogue details.
